country.title: Country code
country.description: Lowercase country code this row applies to (e.g. uk).

petrol.title: Petrol average
petrol.description: National average unleaded in this row's ISO currency (major unit) per volumeUnit.

diesel.title: Diesel average
diesel.description: National average diesel in this row's ISO currency (major unit) per volumeUnit.

lastUpdate.title: Source last update
lastUpdate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp in UTC when upstream data was last updated, when known.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: ISO 4217 code for ``petrol`` and ``diesel`` (major unit of this currency per volumeUnit).

volumeUnit.title: Volume unit
volumeUnit.description: Volume basis for the average (e.g. litre).

error.title: Error code
error.description: Stable machine-readable error code written before the Actor exits with failure.

message.title: Message
message.description: Human-readable explanation for users and integrations.
message.example: Could not obtain UK fuel averages from primary or fallback sources.

country.title: Requested country
country.description: Country value from Actor input (as requested).

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Single table: success rows show prices and units; error rows show error and message.
